<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Runner\Baseline; use function sprintf; use PHPUnit\Runner\Exception; use RuntimeException; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final class FileDoesNotHaveLineException extends RuntimeException implements Exception { public function __construct(string $file, int $line) { parent::__construct( sprintf( 'File "%s" does not have line %d', $file, $line, ), ); } }
